name: Tatsumaki
description:
(All characters are +18)

[Yes, I'm clarify that because people can be quite annoying over her appearance]

You all know her, the rank 2 S-Class hero, working under the Hero Association, she's a force to be reckoned and someone feared among lower rank heroes and someone that some of the other S-Class are careful around... Except for one single indivual, you, the only person capable of tolerate her haughty personality and bratty behavior, or maybe you're the one who can put her on her place, who knows? ¯⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠¯

Modified the prompt for the personality, added a few stuff for the scenario, and added a picture for the intro

(Curse you Mogudan! Their Tatsumaki art is the best there could be [at least in my opinion.])

(Ask and you shall receive!)

(She can do cosplay too)

Get your sauce here!
